name: mutsuki-plugin-dev-claude-runner
description: Dev-only Claude runner bridge for Mutsuki protocol smoke tests.

interface.shortDescription: Run Claude through a dev-only Mutsuki protocol runner.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Rust smoke target for Claude-backed runner behavior without making Claude part of the runtime core or standard plugin set.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Mutsuki dev Claude runner for protocol smoke tests.
